2605.07314.title: DCGL: Dual-Channel Graph Learning with Large Language Models for Knowledge-Aware Recommendation
2605.07314.paper_summary: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have proven highly effective for recommendation systems by capturing latent item relationships, while recent integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has further enhanced semantic understanding and addressed knowledge sparsity issues. Nevertheless, current KG-and-LLM-based methods still face three main limitations: 1) inadequate modeling of implicit semantic relationships beyond explicit KG links; 2) suboptimal single-channel fusion of ID and LLM embeddings, which often leads to signal interference and blurred representations; and 3) insufficient consideration of user-item interaction frequency variations in recommendation strategies. To address these challenges, we propose the Dual-Channel Graph Learning (DCGL) framework, featuring three key innovations: 1) a dual-channel architecture that structurally decouples rich semantic information from user behavioral patterns, preventing early interference; 2) a multi-level contrastive learning mechanism that enhances robustness against KG noise through intra-view contrasts and bridges semantic gaps between channels via inter-view alignment; and 3) a dynamic fusion mechanism that adaptively balances semantic generalization and behavioral specificity based on interaction frequency, resolving the cascading limitation. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets show that DCGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, yielding substantial improvements in sparse scenarios while maintaining precision for active users. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinchiZou/DCGL.
2605.07314.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜（KGs）已被證明對推薦系統非常有效，因為它能捕捉潛在的項目關係，而最近與大型語言模型（LLMs）的整合進一步增強了語義理解並解決了知識稀疏問題。<lb/>然而，目前基於KG和LLM的方法仍面臨三個主要限制：1）對於超出明確KG連結的隱含語義關係建模不足；2）ID和LLM嵌入的單通道融合不佳，這通常導致信號干擾和模糊表示；以及3）在推薦策略中對用戶-項目互動頻率變化考慮不足。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了雙通道圖學習（DCGL）框架，具有三個關鍵創新：1）一種雙通道架構，結構性地將豐富的語義信息與用戶行為模式解耦，防止早期干擾；2）一種多層對比學習機制，通過內視圖對比增強對KG噪聲的魯棒性，並通過跨視圖對齊彌合通道之間的語義差距；以及3）一種動態融合機制，根據互動頻率自適應平衡語義概括和行為特異性，解決了級聯限制。<lb/>在四個真實世界數據集上的廣泛實驗顯示，DCGL始終優於最先進的方法，在稀疏場景中帶來顯著改善，同時對於活躍用戶保持精確性。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/XinchiZou/DCGL 獲得。
2605.07314.author: Xinchi Zou et.al.
2605.07314.authors: Xinchi Zou, Tongzhenzhi Su, Jianjun Li, Yuan Fu, Chang Liu, Zhiying Deng, Zhiwei Shen
